---
name: Proposal discussion
about: Issue to discuss a rule proposal or a rule where the details have to be discussed
title: "[Category] | [Rule title]"
labels: discussion
assignees: ''

---

## How to participate in the discussion

1. React to this main comment with :thumbsup: if you agree with the proposal and :thumbsdown: if you do not agree.
2. If you do not agree, try to add the reasoning behind the disagreement and an alternative if possible.
3. Try not to repeat an argument already made by other people, react to their comment instead.

## Extra reasoning for the proposal
